# comfyui_output (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a ComfyUI output file.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "comfyui_output" "latest" {
  prompt_id = "abc-123-def"
}

output "output_images" {
  value = data.comfyui_output.latest.images
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `filename` (String) The output filename to look up.

### Optional

- `subfolder` (String) Subfolder within the output directory.
- `type` (String) Output type (e.g., output, input, temp).

### Read-Only

- `exists` (Boolean) Whether the output file exists on the server.
- `url` (String) Full URL to download the output file.
